# Owlbell

> Managed reception agency for US plumbing contractors.

Owlbell answers inbound calls 24/7, qualifies leads, books appointments, and texts job details to the shop owner. It is a managed agency service, not self-serve software.

## Service

- Industry: US plumbing contractors only
- Offering: 24/7 call answering, emergency routing, lead capture, booking, owner SMS alerts
- Trial: 7-day trial on every plan; cancel during trial
- Onboarding: White-glove setup via https://owlbell.xyz/onboarding

## Pricing (monthly)

- Launch: $1,497/mo - 24/7 answering, emergency routing, owner alerts
- Growth: $4,997/mo - booking workflow, CRM handoff, dedicated success contact
- Scale: $9,997+/mo - multi-location, custom SLAs, dedicated success lead

## Contact (async-only)

- Email: hello@owlbell.xyz - sales, onboarding, and support
- Agency does not call clients - no sales calls, onboarding calls, or phone support
- Onboarding: https://owlbell.xyz/onboarding (intake form after subscribe)

## Demo

- Live Retell demo: https://owlbell.xyz/demo
- Fallback audio walkthrough: https://owlbell.xyz/demos/plumbing-emergency-sample.mp3

## Key pages

- Home: https://owlbell.xyz/
- FAQ: https://owlbell.xyz/faq
- Onboarding: https://owlbell.xyz/onboarding
- Privacy: https://owlbell.xyz/privacy
- Terms: https://owlbell.xyz/terms
